note: PLACEHOLDER — review and confirm this list (and each processor's DPA / data-residency) before launch. These are the third parties that may process content submitted to TruthLayer.

subprocessors.name: OpenRouter (and the upstream model provider you select)
subprocessors.purpose: LLM inference, embeddings, and audio transcription
subprocessors.data_processed: video transcript text, extracted claims, on-screen OCR text

subprocessors.name: Supabase
subprocessors.data_processed: account identity and all stored application data

subprocessors.name: Hive
subprocessors.data_processed: video media (fetched via a short-lived signed URL)
